description: Deterministic strategy registry for Janus Playwright live runner generator. Each strategy maps to a hardcoded template in the generator script.

chat_window_scoped_send_v1.description: Focuses chat window, fills input, registers stream listener before Enter submit, avoids blocking await sendMessage('A')

chat_button_click_send_v1.description: Promise.all race-free send: pressSequentially fills the input keystroke-by-keystroke (triggers frontend send-button enable logic), then Promise.all attaches waitForResponse(/api/chat/stream) BEFORE the #send-button-<chatWindow> click({force:true}) fires, eliminating the race window. Patient toPass polling waits for real content (not '...') in the assistant bubble.

form_request_submit_v1.description: Direct form.submit() or requestSubmit() bypassing button overlay issues

assistant_stream_complete_v1.description: Waits for assistant bubble visibility, non-empty content, classifies timeout/SSE errors

assistant_text_present_v1.description: Waits for any non-empty assistant text without requiring stream completion

error_toast_v1.description: Waits for visible error toast or system message

capture_network_v1.description: Collects network events, stream requests, request failures

capture_console_v1.description: Collects console logs, errors, warnings, page errors

capture_ui_state_v1.description: Captures page snapshot and visible UI state at failure time

contains_any_v1.description: Evaluates response text against containsAny list

must_not_contain_v1.description: Evaluates response text against mustNotContain list

tool_call_detected_v1.description: Verifies that a specific tool call was executed. Captures POST /api/chat/stream response bodies, parses SSE tool_result/tool_call/tool_start frames, and matches the observed tool name (normalized: '.' <-> '_') against the expected name. Accepts expected.tool (preferred) or expected.toolCallExpected (legacy).

model_selection_v1.description: Per-test: set chat-header-provider/model for the plan chatWindow to tests[].provider/tests[].model, then wait until #send-button-<window> is enabled.

model_selection_v2_5.description: Per-test: commit chat-header-provider/model values via DOM change events, break sidebar inheritance, ensure provider selection exists through /api/models/selection, then wait until #send-button-<window> is enabled.

errorClassification.RUNNER_SELECTOR_FAILURE: Playwright could not find expected DOM element
errorClassification.RUNNER_WAIT_FAILURE: Wait condition (selector, response, function) did not resolve
errorClassification.RUNNER_STREAM_TIMEOUT: Stream request was not observed within timeout
errorClassification.FRONTEND_NOT_READY: Frontend DOM or dev server not available
errorClassification.INFRASTRUCTURE_OFFLINE: Connection refused or unreachable (ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED); route to Skill 5 E2E infra/debug, not finding triage
errorClassification.PROVIDER_TIMEOUT: LLM provider did not respond within expected time
errorClassification.TOOL_ROUTING_FAILURE: Wrong or no tool was called for the prompt
errorClassification.ASSERTION_MISMATCH: Response text did not match expected assertions

statusClassification.TOOL_ROUTING_PASS: Expected tool was triggered; success classification for routing-only tests
statusClassification.MANUAL_GATE_REQUIRED: TestPlan explicitly requires a manual gate; not a runner failure
